author: Peter Falkesand
name: FalkForge EXE bundle installer
description: A self-extracting EXE bundle installer project using the FalkForge fluent API: builds an MSI and chains it into a bundle fronted by the NativeAOT FalkForge engine. dotnet run builds both.

ProductName.description: Product name shown in the installer.

FalkForgeVersion.description: Version of the FalkForge meta-package to reference.
